subject: humanoid fighter in orange gi, airborne in martial arts stance, energy lines radiating outward
description: A humanoid figure dressed in an orange and dark-trimmed martial arts gi leaps in a dynamic airborne combat pose, arms and legs extended in a fighting stance. Bright energy lines radiate outward from the figure in all directions against a green-tinted action background, conveying speed and force. The card name and game context identify this as Yamcha from Dragon Ball Super.
foreground: airborne fighter in gi, mid-leap fighting stance
background: radiating energy lines, green-tinted motion blur
